headline.title: 股市下跌，AI热潮退烧，油价飙升：三重打击令市场承压
headline.summary: 全球股市与债券同步下跌，投资者面临三重逆风：人工智能交易退潮、美联储加息预期升温以及中东冲突恶化推高油价。科技股领跌，资金转向防御性板块。
headline.title_en: Stock Losses Build as AI Rally Cools, Oil Jumps: Markets Wrap
headline.summary_en: Stocks and bonds dropped as investors faced a trio of headwinds: a pullback in the artificial-intelligence trade, mounting bets on a US interest rate hike, and rising oil prices due to a worsening of the Middle East conflict. Tech stocks led the decline as money rotated into defensive sectors.
headline.reason: 综合反映当日市场三大核心风险：AI板块估值回调、美联储政策转向预期及地缘政治紧张，直接影响全球资产配置，与AI科技和国际事务板块联动紧密。
headline.reason_en: Captures the three key market risks of the day: AI sector valuation correction, rising Fed rate hike expectations, and geopolitical tensions, directly impacting global asset allocation and closely tied to both AI/tech and world affairs sections.
